headerDisplay: Monitor your UPS via NUT. **The live dashboard (voltage, battery, load, runtime history) is served as a standalone website** — set a **Standalone Dashboard Port** below, save, and restart Homebridge.
footerDisplay: **📊 Open the dashboard:** once a port is set and Homebridge has restarted, browse to `http://homebridge.local:PORT` or `http://localhost:PORT` (replace `PORT` with the value below). It works from any browser on your network — phone, tablet, or desktop.

host.title: NUT Server Host
host.description: Hostname or IP of the machine running upsd. Use 127.0.0.1 if NUT is on the same Pi.

username.title: NUT Username
username.description: Leave blank if upsmon.conf does not require authentication.

password.title: NUT Password
password.description: Leave blank if upsmon.conf does not require authentication.

ups.title: UPS Name(s)
ups.description: One or more UPS names as reported by 'upsc -l'. Typically just ['ups'].

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to query NUT for fresh data.

lowBatteryThreshold.title: Low Battery Threshold (%)
lowBatteryThreshold.description: Battery percentage below which the Low Battery alert triggers in HomeKit.

standalonePort.title: Standalone Dashboard Port
standalonePort.description: Port to host the UPS dashboard as a local website (1–65535, e.g. 8581). Leave blank to disable. After saving and restarting Homebridge, open http://homebridge.local:8581 (or http://localhost:8581) — substituting the port you set here.

alarmControl.title: Enable Audible Alarm Control
alarmControl.description: Expose a HomeKit switch to enable/disable the UPS beeper. Requires a NUT UPS that supports the beeper commands and upsd.users credentials with 'instcmds = beeper.* ' (or ALL). Writes to the UPS.

syncLowBatteryThreshold.title: Write Low Battery Threshold to UPS
syncLowBatteryThreshold.description: On startup, push the Low Battery Threshold above to the UPS (NUT 'battery.charge.low') where the device allows it. Requires upsd.users credentials with 'actions = SET'. Writes to the UPS.

layout.title: UPS Controls (advanced — writes to the UPS)
layout.description: Optional. These options send commands to the UPS and need privileged upsd.users credentials. Leave off for read-only monitoring.

layout.title: Standalone Dashboard
layout.description: This is where you view your UPS data. Host the dashboard as a local website accessible from any browser on your network, then open it at http://homebridge.local:PORT.
